events.text: Assessment: at the tagged 25° hitch angle, each sling leg must carry ≈3,549 lb (1,500 lb vertical share ÷ sin 25°), which exceeds the tagged 3,500 lb WLL per leg — and 25° is well below the standard 30° minimum angle guidance, so this configuration fails and must not be used as planned.
